A

ACE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Ace: contributes either 1 or 10, whichever is more convenient.
addCard(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Adds a card to the player's hand.
addToBottom(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Adds a card to the back of the deck.
announceWinner() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Announces the winner of the game and ends the interaction.
App - Class in com.example.cincuentazo
Entry point of the Cincuentazo application.
App() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.App
 

B

backButton - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Button that returns to the start screen.
buildFullDeck() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Populates the deck with all 52 combinations of suit and rank.

C

canPlayerMove(Player) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Determines whether the given player has at least one card they could legally play given the current table sum.
card - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler.CardMouseAdapter
The card this adapter is bound to.
card - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy.Move
The card the machine will play.
card - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
The card this view represents (may be null for a pure back).
Card - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Represents a single immutable playing card, defined by its suit and rank.
Card(Suit, Rank) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Creates a new card with the given suit and rank.
CardClickListener - Interface in com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler
Custom listener contract notified when the human player clicks on a card from their hand.
cardHasLegalValue(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Checks whether a card has at least one value that would be a legal move at the current table sum.
CardMouseAdapter - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler
Adapter that bridges low-level JavaFX mouse events to the higher-level CardClickListener contract.
CardMouseAdapter(Card, CardClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler.CardMouseAdapter
Creates an adapter binding a card to a click listener.
cards - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Queue holding the cards of the deck (front = next to be drawn).
CardView - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.view
Visual representation of a single playing card in the user interface.
CardView(Card, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
Creates a card view.
chooseCardValue(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Chooses the most convenient value for a card.
chooseMove(Player, Table) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy
Chooses a legal move for the given machine player at the current table state.
CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
The clubs suit.
collectCardsForRecycling() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Removes and returns every card on the table except the top one, so that they can be shuffled back into the deck when it runs out.
com.example.cincuentazo - module com.example.cincuentazo
 
com.example.cincuentazo - package com.example.cincuentazo
 
com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency - package com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency
 
com.example.cincuentazo.controller - package com.example.cincuentazo.controller
 
com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler - package com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler
 
com.example.cincuentazo.model - package com.example.cincuentazo.model
 
com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception - package com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception
 
com.example.cincuentazo.model.game - package com.example.cincuentazo.model.game
 
com.example.cincuentazo.model.player - package com.example.cincuentazo.model.player
 
com.example.cincuentazo.view - package com.example.cincuentazo.view
 
currentSum - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
The current accumulated sum on the table.

D

deck - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
The deck of cards.
Deck - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Represents the deck of cards used in a game of Cincuentazo.
Deck() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Builds a full, shuffled 52-card deck.
deckPane - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Stack pane that represents the draw deck.
DIAMONDS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
The diamonds suit.
displayName - Variable in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Human-readable name of the suit.
draw() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Draws and removes the card at the front of the deck.
drawAndEndTurn() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Draws a replacement card from the deck for the current player and ends their turn, moving them to the back of the turn queue (HU-4).
drawFromDeck() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Draws a card from the deck, refilling it from the table's recycled cards if it is empty.

E

EIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Eight: adds 8.
eliminate() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Marks this player as eliminated.
eliminateCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Eliminates the current player from the game, returning their cards to the bottom of the deck, and advances to the next player (HU-5).
eliminated - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Whether this player has been eliminated from the game.
EmptyDeckException - Exception in com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception
Checked exception thrown when an operation requires drawing a card but the deck is empty and cannot be refilled.
EmptyDeckException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception.EmptyDeckException
Constructs the exception with a descriptive message.
ensureStarted() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Ensures the game has been set up before performing an operation.
equals(Object) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Compares this card with another object for equality.
EXTRA_DRAW_DELAY_MS - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Maximum extra milliseconds (random) before drawing a card.
EXTRA_PLAY_DELAY_MS - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Maximum extra milliseconds (random) before playing a card.

F

FIVE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Five: adds 5.
FOUR - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Four: adds 4.

G

GAME_VIEW_PATH - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Classpath location of the game view.
GameController - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.controller
Controller for the main game view of Cincuentazo.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
 
GameController.KeyboardHandler - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.controller
Inner class that handles keyboard shortcuts during the game.
gameLogic - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
The game engine that holds all the rules and state.
GameLogic - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.game
Central game engine that orchestrates a full game of Cincuentazo.
GameLogic(List<Player>) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Creates a new game engine with the given players.
GameStateException - Exception in com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception
Unchecked exception thrown when an operation is attempted in an invalid game state — for example, trying to play a card before the game has been set up, or after it has already finished.
GameStateException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception.GameStateException
Constructs the exception with a descriptive message.
getCard() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy.Move
Returns the card of this move.
getCard() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
Returns the card represented by this view.
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Returns the player whose turn it currently is, without removing them from the queue.
getCurrentSum() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Returns the current accumulated sum on the table.
getDisplayName() - Method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Returns the human-readable name of this suit.
getHand() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Returns an unmodifiable view of the player's hand, preventing external code from altering the hand directly.
getHandSize() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Returns the number of cards currently in the player's hand.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Returns the single shared instance of the view manager.
getMaxValue() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Returns the maximum value this card contributes to the table sum.
getMaxValue() - Method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Returns the maximum value this rank contributes to the table sum.
getMinValue() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Returns the minimum value this card contributes to the table sum.
getMinValue() - Method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Returns the minimum value this rank contributes to the table sum.
getName() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Returns the player's display name.
getRank() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Returns the rank of this card.
getRemainingPlayers() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Returns the number of players still active in the game.
getSelectedOpponents() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Returns the number of machine opponents selected by the player.
getSuit() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Returns the suit of this card.
getSuitSymbol(Suit) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
Returns a single-character symbol for a suit, for display purposes.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Returns the symbol displayed on the card.
getTable() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Returns the table associated with this game.
getTopCard() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Returns the card currently on top of the table (the active card).
getValue() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy.Move
Returns the chosen value of this move.
getWinner() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Returns the winner of the game: the single remaining player.

H

hand - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
The player's hand of cards (unique cards, insertion-ordered).
HAND_SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
The maximum number of cards a player holds in hand.
handle(KeyEvent) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController.KeyboardHandler
Handles a key press event.
handle(MouseEvent) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler.CardMouseAdapter
Handles a mouse click by forwarding the bound card to the listener.
handleStartGame() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Handles the start button action by requesting the game view, passing the selected number of machine opponents.
hasFlexibleValue() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Indicates whether this card has a flexible value (only Aces do).
hasFlexibleValue() - Method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Indicates whether this rank has a flexible value (only the Ace).
hashCode() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Returns a hash code consistent with Card.equals(Object).
HEARTS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
The hearts suit.
humanHandBox - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Horizontal box that holds the human player's hand of cards.
humanHasPlayed - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Whether the human player has already played a card this turn.
humanPlayer - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
The human player.

I

initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Initialization callback.
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Initialization callback invoked automatically after the FXML view has been loaded.
initialize(Stage) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Stores the primary stage and applies the base window configuration.
installKeyboardHandler() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Installs the keyboard handler on the scene once it is available.
INSTANCE - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
The single shared instance of this manager.
InvalidMoveException - Exception in com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception
Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would break the core rule of Cincuentazo: making the table sum exceed 50.
InvalidMoveException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception.InvalidMoveException
Constructs the exception with a descriptive message.
InvalidMoveException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.example.cincuentazo.model.exception.InvalidMoveException
Constructs the exception with a descriptive message and an underlying cause.
isEliminated() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Indicates whether this player has been eliminated.
isEmpty() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Checks whether the deck has no cards left.
isGameOver() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Checks whether the game is over, which happens when only one player remains in the turn queue (HU-6).
isLegalMove(int) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Checks whether playing the given value would respect the core rule (the resulting sum must not exceed 50).
isMachine() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Indicates whether this player is controlled by the machine.
isRedSuit(Suit) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
Determines whether a suit is rendered in red (hearts or diamonds).

J

JACK - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Jack: subtracts 10.

K

KeyboardHandler() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController.KeyboardHandler
 
KING - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
King: subtracts 10.

L

leftOpponentPane - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Container for the left machine opponent.
listener - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler.CardMouseAdapter
The listener notified when the card is clicked.

M

machine - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Whether this player is controlled by the machine.
machineOpponents - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Number of machine opponents selected on the start screen.
machinePlayers - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
The machine players, in display order.
machineStrategy - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Strategy that decides which card a machine plays.
MachineStrategy - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.game
Encapsulates the decision logic a machine player uses to choose which card to play on its turn.
MachineStrategy() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy
 
MachineStrategy.Move - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.game
Represents a chosen move: which card to play and with what value.
machineTurnService - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Service that schedules machine turns on background threads.
MachineTurnService - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency
Service that schedules the timed actions of a machine player using background threads, so the user interface never freezes.
MachineTurnService() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.cincuentazo.App
Standard Java entry point.
MAX_SUM - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
The maximum allowed value for the table sum.
maxValue - Variable in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Maximum value this rank contributes to the table sum.
MIN_DRAW_DELAY_MS - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Minimum milliseconds a machine waits before drawing a card.
MIN_PLAY_DELAY_MS - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Minimum milliseconds a machine waits before playing a card.
minValue - Variable in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Minimum value this rank contributes to the table sum.
Move(Card, int) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy.Move
Creates a move.

N

name - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
The player's display name.
NINE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Nine: neither adds nor subtracts.

O

onCardClicked(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Invoked when the human player clicks on one of their cards.
onCardClicked(Card) - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.controller.handler.CardClickListener
Invoked when the human player clicks on one of their cards.
oneOpponentRadio - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Radio button to play against one machine opponent.
opponentsToggleGroup - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Toggle group that ensures only one opponent option is selected.

P

placeInitialCard(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Places the initial card on the table and sets the starting sum.
playCard(Card, int) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Attempts to play the given card for the current player using the specified value, enforcing the core rule of the game (HU-3).
playCard(Card, int) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Plays a card on the table using the given chosen value, updating the accumulated sum.
playedCards - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Stack of played cards; the top is the currently active card.
Player - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.player
Represents a player in a game of Cincuentazo, either the human player or a machine opponent.
Player(String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Creates a new player with the given name and type.
playMachineTurn(Player) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Executes a machine player's turn: chooses a move, plays it (or eliminates the player if no move is possible), draws a card after a short delay, and then advances to the next turn.
previewSum(int) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Returns the value that would result from playing the given card with a specific chosen value, without modifying the table.
primaryStage - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
The primary stage provided by the JavaFX runtime.
processingTurn - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Flag to prevent overlapping turn processing.
processNextTurn() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Processes the next turn.

Q

QUEEN - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Queen: subtracts 10.

R

random - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Random source for the variable delays.
rank - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
The rank of this card.
Rank - Enum Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Represents the rank of a card and its associated value rules in the game of Cincuentazo.
Rank(String, int, int) - Constructor for enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Creates a rank with its display symbol and value range.
refillDeckFromTable() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Refills the deck by collecting the table's cards (except the top one), shuffling them and returning them to the deck.
refreshBoard() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Redraws the entire board to reflect the current model state.
removeCard(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.player.Player
Removes a card from the player's hand.
renderFaceDown() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
Renders the back of the card (used for hidden machine cards).
renderFaceUp() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.CardView
Renders the card showing its rank and suit.
renderHumanHand() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Renders the human player's hand face-up, attaching a mouse adapter to each card so it can be clicked.
renderMachineHands() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Renders the machine players' hands face-down in their panes.
renderTable() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Renders the top card currently on the table.
rightOpponentPane - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Container for the right machine opponent.
runAfterDelay(int, Runnable) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Runs the given action after the specified delay on a background thread, then dispatches the action to the JavaFX Application Thread.

S

scheduleDraw(Runnable) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Schedules the "draw a card" action of a machine after a random delay of 1 to 2 seconds.
schedulePlay(Runnable) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.concurrency.MachineTurnService
Schedules the "play a card" action of a machine after a random delay of 2 to 4 seconds.
setMachineOpponents(int) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Sets the number of machine opponents and starts the game.
setupGame() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Sets up the game: deals Player.HAND_SIZE cards to each player and places the initial card on the table (HU-2).
SEVEN - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Seven: adds 7.
showGameView(int) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Loads and displays the game view, passing the chosen number of machine opponents to its controller.
showStartView() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Loads and displays the start view, where the player selects how many machine opponents to play against.
shuffle() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Randomly shuffles the cards currently in the deck.
SIX - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Six: adds 6.
size() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Returns the number of cards currently in the deck.
size() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Returns the number of cards currently on the table.
SPADES - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
The spades suit.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.App
JavaFX entry point.
START_VIEW_PATH - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Classpath location of the start (player selection) view.
startButton - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Button that starts the game with the selected number of opponents.
StartController - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.controller
Controller for the start view, where the human player chooses how many machine opponents (1, 2 or 3) to play against before starting the game.
StartController() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
 
started - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Whether the game has been set up and is ready to play.
startGame() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Builds the players, sets up the game engine, deals the cards and renders the initial board.
statusLabel - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Label that shows status messages to the player.
statusLabel - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Label used to display status or feedback messages to the player.
suit - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
The suit of this card.
Suit - Enum Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Represents the four suits of a standard French-suited deck of cards.
Suit(String) - Constructor for enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Creates a suit with a human-readable display name.
sumLabel - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Label showing the current accumulated sum on the table.
swapScene(String) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Loads the FXML located at the given classpath path and sets it as the current scene on the primary stage.
symbol - Variable in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Symbol displayed on the card (e.g.

T

table - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
The table holding the played cards and the running sum.
Table - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.game
Represents the table at the center of a Cincuentazo game.
Table() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.Table
Creates an empty table with a starting sum of zero.
tableCardPane - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Stack pane that displays the current top card on the table.
TEN - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Ten: adds 10.
THREE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Three: adds 3.
threeOpponentsRadio - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Radio button to play against three machine opponents.
topOpponentPane - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
Container for the top machine opponent.
toString() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Returns a human-readable representation of this card, useful for debugging and console output.
turnOrder - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
Queue of active players defining the turn order.
TWO - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Two: adds 2.
twoOpponentsRadio - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.controller.StartController
Radio button to play against two machine opponents.

V

value - Variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.MachineStrategy.Move
The value the card will contribute to the table sum.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Rank
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
ViewManager - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.view
Centralized manager responsible for loading FXML views and swapping scenes on the primary stage.
ViewManager() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.view.ViewManager
Private constructor to enforce the Singleton pattern.

W
